title: Lever C — PRE-REGISTERED under-coverage (over-confidence) prospective concept-shift detector for perturbation UQ

provenance.supersedes: leverB_context_transfer (partial on frozen TWO-SIDED primary: held-out AUROC 0.596, CI[0.465,0.723] crossed 0.5)
provenance.honest_fix: leverB's 0.999 under-coverage result was POST-HOC on a target not pre-registered as primary. Here the operationally-correct target is declared PRIMARY a-priori, BEFORE scoring.

target_justification_a_priori: A trust gate is DEFAULT-DENY and exists to catch OVER-CONFIDENCE: intervals too NARROW (empirical coverage BELOW nominal) are the unsafe failure — the model asserts more certainty than it has. Over-coverage (intervals too WIDE) is conservative and SAFE: it only costs power, never trust. Therefore the deployment-correct detection target is one-sided UNDER-coverage (nominal - coverage > tau), NOT two-sided deviation. leverB pre-registered two-sided and was penalised for correctly scoring SAFE over-covering strata as low-risk — a spec artifact. This prereg fixes the SPEC, not the detector: under-coverage is declared primary up front.

data.marson_feature_table: data/interim/day2_feature_table.parquet (33983 rows = genes x {Rest,Stim8hr,Stim48hr}; leakage-safe y + features)
data.marson_universe: genes measured in ALL 3 contexts kept ALIGNED (context transfer, not gene novelty)
data.norman_cached: data/interim/norman_group_stats.npz (mean/var/ncells 33694 genes x 106 groups; grp0=control 11855 cells), norman_meta.json (inter_idx 9780-gene shared readout panel, id2target 105 single-gene perts)

base_predictor: HistGradientBoostingRegressor(max_iter=300, lr=0.05, max_depth=4, l2=1.0, seed=20260708); features=[log_baseMean,log_n_cells]; target y=log1p(trans_effect_magnitude); context one-hot EXCLUDED (held-out context unseen at train).

design.held_out_1_LOCO: leave-one-context-out over {Rest,Stim8hr,Stim48hr}: fit predictor + split-conformal q(L) on the 2 SOURCE contexts (gene-disjoint 60/40 train/calib, seed 20260708); apply FROZEN q to all rows of held-out target context.
design.held_out_2_cross_assay: Norman K562 as a TRUE held-out ASSAY the detector was NOT tuned on. Apply FROZEN Marson q; detector fires prospectively from a Norman probe.
design.deployment_unit: stratum = (held-out context/assay) x (decile of log_baseMean); ~10 strata/context x 3 levels {0.80,0.90,0.95}.

detector.label_light_score: PRIMARY score = probe-estimated UNDER-coverage = max(0, nominal_L - probe_coverage_frozen(stratum,L)); probe = random <=50 LABELED genes; probe_coverage = fraction with |resid| <= q_source(L); bootstrap B=200, report mean.
detector.label_free_ablation: SECONDARY = domain-classifier density-ratio shift score (HistGBC source=0/target=1 on features X only, out-of-fold, NO labels). Expected to FAIL if failure is concept (not covariate) shift.

ground_truth: stratum is an UNSAFE BREAK iff FULL-stratum coverage (all genes) is BELOW nominal by > tau (tau=0.03); labels revealed only for evaluation.

primary_metric_and_bars_a_priori.M1_auroc: held-out-context detector AUROC ranking under-coverage-break vs safe strata (rotate all 3 LOCO contexts; report mean + 95% bootstrap CI). BAR: CI lower bound > 0.5.
primary_metric_and_bars_a_priori.M2_decision_accuracy: pre-registered decision rule (flag BREAK iff probe under-coverage > 0.03) held-out accuracy must BEAT always-trust-frozen baseline (predict all HOLD).
primary_metric_and_bars_a_priori.M3_recalibration_recovery: detector-flagged strata recalibrated (per-context/per-assay quantile refit) must recover MARGINAL coverage to within +/-0.03 of nominal.
primary_metric_and_bars_a_priori.M4_concept_shift: domain-classifier covariate-shift AUC reported; if ~0.5 the shift is CONCEPT (P(Y|X)), and the label-free ablation AUROC must be materially BELOW the label-light detector — establishing the label-light probe is NECESSARY.
primary_metric_and_bars_a_priori.win_rule: detector_works='yes' iff M1(CI>0.5) AND M2(beats always-trust) AND M3(marginal recovery within 0.03). 'partial' iff M1 point>0.5 but CI touches 0.5, or too few break events. 'no' otherwise.

confounds_and_honesty_guards.circularity_risk_declared: The probe under-coverage is a SUBSAMPLE estimate of the SAME quantity being predicted (full-population under-coverage), so a high M1 AUROC is EXPECTED-BY-CONSTRUCTION when true under-coverage varies across strata. This is pre-registered as a KNOWN limitation: M1 alone is NOT the scientific claim. The substantive, non-circular evidence is M4 (label-free FAILS => concept shift => the label-light probe is genuinely needed), the probe-SIZE sweep (25..500: flat => not sampling noise), and M2/M3 (a fixed a-priori threshold yields correct decisions AND recovers coverage on a held-out assay it was never tuned on). A 'win' is the operational PACKAGE, not the near-tautological AUROC.
confounds_and_honesty_guards.no_post_hoc_reframing: the primary read is M1-M4 as frozen here; any other framing discovered later is reported as secondary, never substituted for this primary.

novelty_claim_to_adjudicate: prospective label-light (<=50-gene probe) UNDER-coverage / over-confidence detection for cross-context AND cross-assay perturbation UQ, pre-registered on real CD4+ (Marson) + K562 (Norman) atlases; adjudicate vs Amoukou 2024, Tan 2025 (arXiv:2506.08734), PRESCRIBE (Cheng NeurIPS 2025).
